failure.error_msg: dmem_req_o must be asserted assert 0 == 1 + where 0 = int(Logic('0')) + where Logic('0') = LogicObject(load_store_unit.ex_if_ready_o).value + where LogicObject(load_store_unit.ex_if_ready_o) = HierarchyObject(load_store_unit).ex_if_ready_o + where HierarchyObject(load_store_unit) = <harness_library.dmemIFDriver object at 0xffff9af0bfb0>.dut
